title: DGAF Audit Event
description: Herald-generated audit event schema. All 6 required fields must be non-null. Used by audit_hallucination_rate eval task and ClickHouse append sink.

role.description: DGAF agent role name (e.g. Amethyst, COLLEEN, Sentinel, DemiJoule, Apogee, Herald)

curvature.description: Role curvature scalar from governance.yml. Bounded [0.0, 1.0].

contraction.description: Contraction rate rho for this role's governance transition operator. Must be < 1.0 for valid kernel.

gate_result.description: Result of the governance gate for this event.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the governance decision.

event_id.description: Optional UUID for the event. Auto-generated by Herald if not provided.

decision_trace.description: Optional: abbreviated trace of the governance decision chain.

pattern_ids.description: Optional: NDR pattern IDs active at time of event.
